_comment: Review-prompt gating config consumed by scripts/review_gate.py. Tune the thresholds per product. All four gates are AND-combined; only a satisfied, mature, within-cap, non-negative user reaches REQUEST_REVIEW. Dissatisfied users are routed to feedback_form_destination instead of the store.

_satisfaction_signal_definition._comment: What counts as a positive signal upstream (set user_state.satisfaction_signal=true when ANY of these is true). The gate does not compute this — your app does — but document it here so it is auditable.
_satisfaction_signal_definition.value_action: user completed a core value/aha action (define per product)
